payload.label: window
payload.long_description: Tall rectangular interior window fitted with closed white horizontal blinds (plastic/vinyl); dark-painted frame and dark curtain panels are visible at the sides, slats mostly closed with faint daylight seeping through horizontal gaps, and the lower-right portion is slightly occluded by a piece of furniture — camera appears roughly 2.5 meters away.

message.content: {"label":"window","short_description":"white-blind window with dark frame","long_description":"Tall rectangular interior window fitted with closed white horizontal blinds (plastic/vinyl); dark-painted frame and dark curtain panels are visible at the sides, slats mostly closed with faint daylight seeping through horizontal gaps, and the lower-right portion is slightly occluded by a piece of furniture — camera appears roughly 2.5 meters away.","attributes":["white horizontal blinds","closed slats","faint daylight through gaps","dark-painted frame","dark curtain panels","lower-right occluded by furniture","tall rectangular shape"],"distance_from_camera_m":2.5}
